Extract weight values from an agent's brain

get_brain_weights.Rd

get_brain_weights() returns either all weights concatenated across layers (when layer = NULL) or the weight matrix for a single specified layer. For ANN brains the weight matrix is $W; for BNN brains it is $mu.

Usage

get_brain_weights(env, agent_id = 1L, layer = NULL)

Arguments

env

An environment list returned by run_clade().

agent_id

Integer. The $id field of the agent. Defaults to 1L.

layer

Integer or NULL. If NULL (default), all weights are returned as a named numeric vector. If an integer, the weight matrix for that layer index is returned.

Value

A named numeric vector (when layer = NULL) or a numeric matrix (when layer is specified).

See also

inspect_brain(), run_clade()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
env <- run_clade(default_specs())
get_brain_weights(env, agent_id = 1L)           # all weights
get_brain_weights(env, agent_id = 1L, layer = 1L) # layer-1 matrix
} # }
